---
title: "Lecture 10: Control Flow 2"
date: 2025-07-29
summary: "Writing loops for iteration and repetition"
url_slides: 10-slides.qmd
url_code: csp-materials/loops
page-layout: full
draft: false
---

**Summary**: {< meta summary >}  
**Slides**: [View Slides]({< meta url_slides >})  
**Code**: Copy and run in your console: `usethis::use_course("{< meta url_code >}")`

## Before Class

## Readings
